name: @absolutejs/metering
description: Per-tenant cost-attribution + budget enforcement for multi-tenant runtimes. Consumes handlerMetrics from @absolutejs/sync and spawn/idle/exit events from @absolutejs/runtime; rolls up CPU-ms, bytes egress, hibernation-GB-seconds per tenant; trips a circuit breaker when a per-tenant budget is exceeded.
author: Alex Kahn

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --sourcemap --target=bun && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.check:package: bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run test
scripts.release: bun run format && bun run check:package && bun publish
